title: GATE Drift Decision Event (C19)
description: Emitted by the C19 Drift Detector on each evaluation interval. Records the per-dimension statistical comparison of a rolling production window against the signed baseline. Distinct from gate.assurance.adversarial_outcome (C16).

baseline_hash.description: Hash of the signed baseline this comparison was made against.

abom_hash.description: ABOM in force during the evaluation window.

dimension.description: Behavioural dimension being evaluated (tool_choice, output_length, output_confidence, refusal_rate, retry_rate, reasoning_depth_proxy, or a per-tool argument distribution key).

statistical_test.description: ks (Kolmogorov-Smirnov) for continuous dimensions. chi2 (chi-square) for categorical dimensions.

threshold.description: Configured p-value threshold for this dimension. Drift is detected when p_value < threshold sustained over the configured window count.

decision.description: Resolved drift decision. 'insufficient_data' fires when the window does not have the minimum sample size. 'new_dimension_observed' fires when the current window contains a behaviour outside the baseline support.

trace_id_sample.description: Sampled trace IDs from runs contributing to this window. Bounded to avoid unbounded growth; sampling is unbiased.
